title: Citrusy Chewy Spanish Macaroni Stir-fry
description: A kid-friendly and vegetarian-friendly dish featuring chewy macaroni mixed with a flavorful citrus sauce for a delightful meal.
instructions: Bring a pot of salted water to boil. Cook macaroni according to package instructions until al dente, then drain.
Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onion and garlic; sauté for about 3 minutes or until fragrant.
Add zucchini and red bell pepper to the skillet. Stir occasionally for about 5-7 minutes until vegetables are slightly tender.
Remove from heat, mix in macaroni, and stir well to combine with vegetables.
In a separate bowl, mix together orange juice, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and zest of 1 orange; whisk until smooth. Pour this sauce over the macaroni mixture in the skillet.
Mix well and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes to let flavors meld together. Taste and adjust seasoning if necessary.
Serve hot with a side salad or on its own as a light meal.
